title: salix zangica
intro: Salix zangica, also known as Tibetan willow, is a species of willow tree native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Salix zangica include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the bark of the Salix zangica tree can be dried and ground into a powder, or made into teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
